retroactive_reason: Orchestrator landed W13B commit (9b75f234) without manifest after OOM cut the W13B agent mid-sweep. This manifest reconstructs status from commit log and Wave-13 backlog scope (B2#26).
findings_assigned: B2#26 fixture dedup (~60-file scope; centralize synthetic builders)

B2_26_fixture_dedup_initial_sweep.notes: Centralized 5 high-frequency synthetic-data builders in tests/training/synthetic.py: make_simple_classification, make_simple_regression, make_categorical_classification, make_groupaware_data, make_temporal_data. Each accepts kwargs for customisation and uses local default_rng() (never touches np.random global state). Migrated 4 high-traffic call sites to consume the centralized builders: tests/feature_selection/test_wrappers_phase4.py, tests/feature_selection/test_wrappers_phase4_n3_n6.py, tests/feature_selection/test_wrappers_phase8.py, tests/inference/test_predict_round_trip_parity.py. ~40-50 residue call sites tracked for Wave 14 follow-up (per feedback_cheap_now_vs_expensive_later: 50% delivered immediate dedup wins, remainder mechanical follow-up).

residue_for_w14.scope_remaining: ~40-50 call sites across tests/ still re-roll synthetic data via local _make_*_data / inline pd.DataFrame({...}) / repeated make_classification patterns
residue_for_w14.notes: Continue migration pattern. May need to extend synthetic.py with new helper signatures if call-site asserts depend on seed-specific values. Each migrated file must be pytest-verified GREEN before commit.
